# Jorvee Tours & Travels
# https://jorveetours.github.io

> Jorvee Tours & Travels is a travel and tourism company based in New Delhi, India. We craft unforgettable travel experiences, offering curated tours to the world's most captivating destinations. Founded in 2010, we have served 10,000+ happy travelers across 50+ countries.

## Company Info
- Name: Jorvee Tours & Travels
- Location: Jasola, New Delhi 110025, India
- Phone: +91 9873440127, +91 8860821547
- Email: hello@jorveetours.com
- Website: https://jorveetours.github.io

## Pages

- Home: https://jorveetours.github.io/
- About Us: https://jorveetours.github.io/about
- Destinations Directory: https://jorveetours.github.io/destinations
- India Destinations Directory: https://jorveetours.github.io/destinations/india
- Visa Offerings Directory: https://jorveetours.github.io/visa

## Destinations

- Paris, France: https://jorveetours.github.io/destinations/france/paris
- Tokyo, Japan: https://jorveetours.github.io/destinations/japan/tokyo
- Rome, Italy: https://jorveetours.github.io/destinations/italy/rome
- London, United Kingdom: https://jorveetours.github.io/destinations/united-kingdom/london
- Dubai, UAE: https://jorveetours.github.io/destinations/uae/dubai
- New York City, USA: https://jorveetours.github.io/destinations/usa/new-york
- Istanbul, Turkey: https://jorveetours.github.io/destinations/turkey/istanbul
- Sydney, Australia: https://jorveetours.github.io/destinations/australia/sydney

## India City Destinations

- URL pattern: https://jorveetours.github.io/destinations/india/{state-slug}/{city-slug}
- Coverage: 28 Indian states with major city destination pages
- Examples:
	- New Delhi: https://jorveetours.github.io/destinations/india/delhi/new-delhi
	- Mumbai: https://jorveetours.github.io/destinations/india/maharashtra/mumbai
	- Chennai: https://jorveetours.github.io/destinations/india/tamil-nadu/chennai
	- Bengaluru: https://jorveetours.github.io/destinations/india/karnataka/bengaluru
	- Hyderabad: https://jorveetours.github.io/destinations/india/telangana/hyderabad
	- Kolkata: https://jorveetours.github.io/destinations/india/west-bengal/kolkata
	- Jaipur: https://jorveetours.github.io/destinations/india/rajasthan/jaipur
	- Lucknow: https://jorveetours.github.io/destinations/india/uttar-pradesh/lucknow
	- Varanasi: https://jorveetours.github.io/destinations/india/uttar-pradesh/varanasi
	- Khusi Nagar: https://jorveetours.github.io/destinations/india/uttar-pradesh/khusi-nagar

## Visa Pages

- URL pattern: https://jorveetours.github.io/visa/{visa-slug}
- Directory: https://jorveetours.github.io/visa
- Available visa pages include:
	- Australia: https://jorveetours.github.io/visa/australia
	- Austria: https://jorveetours.github.io/visa/austria

- Group Tours
- Private Tours
- Honeymoon Packages
- Adventure Trips
- Corporate Travel
- Visa Assistance

## SEO Signals
- Primary sitemap: https://jorveetours.github.io/sitemap.xml
- LLM content index: https://jorveetours.github.io/llms.txt
- Canonical domain: https://jorveetours.github.io

## About Our Destination Pages
Each destination page includes:
- City overview and description
- Historic background
- Photo gallery
- Top places to visit
- Local food to try
- Must-see experiences
- Best time to travel
- Nearest airport and railway station
- Related sister cities to explore
